signals.npcLine: Markets are bleeding; fear grips the street scanners.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt the crash: shadow trades falling fast.
signals.worldFeed: Global crypto tides sinking beneath distrust waves.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of sudden market cap erosion detected.

signals.npcLine: RAVE and AAVE nodes flicker, unstable flow.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate the broken chains; fix the glitch.
signals.worldFeed: Trending tokens struggle to stabilize in chaos.
signals.clueEvent: Network anomalies spotted near RAVE and AAVE blocks.

signals.npcLine: Siren signals pierce the fog, warning imminent shifts.
signals.questPulse: Trace the signal source. Could mean big moves.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment turns fearful; siren tokens lead the way.
signals.clueEvent: SIREN token spikes amid market turmoil.

signals.npcLine: Kernel core compromised; urgent patch scramble initiated.
signals.questPulse: Patch the kernel or watch the system fall apart.
signals.worldFeed: KERNEL token stability critical in plunging markets.
signals.clueEvent: Kernel network shows vulnerability under stress.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid miners report stalled transfers; delays critical.
signals.questPulse: Smooth transfer logs before miners hit red alert.
signals.worldFeed: ASTEROID token transfer delays disrupt black market flows.
signals.clueEvent: Transfer delays detected in ASTEROID token routes.
